pkgmetadata.longdescription: Mindustry is a hybrid tower-defense sandbox factory game. Players are tasked with creating elaborate supply chains of conveyor belts to feed ammo into their turrets, producing materials to build with, and defending their structures from waves of enemies. The game can be played cooperatively, competitively, or alone across hand-crafted campaign missions, procedurally generated sectors, and custom maps, with both PvE and PvP multiplayer modes available.
